LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE EHMER GROUP AND RICHARD EHMER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS: A) OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD, AND SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR AN ACCOUNTING; B) SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR THE BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING AND THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION; AND C) SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT. SEE TENTATIVE RULING FOR DETAILS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES HUNTER, CSR #6576, BUS. TEL: 530-339-5023. (D302)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Continued To Nov-16-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jannik P. Catalano of Catalano Law Group (415-436-9236) appears for plaintiff/non-opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE EHMER GROUP and RICHARD EHMER'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is: a) overruled as to the first cause of action for breach of contract, third cause of action for fraud, and sixth cause of action for an accounting; b) sustained without leave to amend as to the second cause of action for the breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and the fourth cause of action for conversion; and c) sustained with twenty days leave as to the fifth cause of action for unjust enrichment. See tentative ruling for details.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

Defendants The Ehmer Group And Richard Ehmer'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint (Added For Posting Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Jul-25-2016 Off Calendar
